source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Fragments from Other Writings of Hippolytus.
verses.text: And again the same (authority), in the first book of his treatise on the Holy Supper, speaks thus:—

verses.book: Fragments from Other Writings of Hippolytus.
verses.text: Now that neither in the first nor in the last there was anything false is evident; for he who said of old, “I will not any more eat the passover,” probably partook of supper before the passover.

verses.book: Fragments from Other Writings of Hippolytus.
verses.text: But the passover He did not eat, but He suffered; for it was not the time for Him to eat.
